Sample: in GBC tissues and cell lines.
Detailed Pathway: MALAT1 down-regulates ABI3BP through EZH2 silencing of H3K27 methylation
Description of disease/function/interact: Long noncoding RNA MALAT1 potentiates growth and inhibits senescence by antagonizing ABI3BP in gallbladder cancer cells.
Therefore, MALAT1 may regulate GC proliferation via AMPK-mTOR-mediated cell apoptosis and autophagy.
